description: Address review issues: fix duplicate background notification handler, fix single-token-per-user storage model, fix chat notification blast, fix logout cleanup race condition, and add clearer comments for VAPID key and gcm_sender_id configuration.
steps: Step 1 - Fix duplicate background notifications in firebase-messaging-sw.js: Remove the manual push event listener and use firebase.messaging().onBackgroundMessage() instead to prevent double-display.

Step 2 - Fix single-token-per-user in core.js: Change token storage to use subcollection hrd_fcm_tokens/{userId}/devices/{tokenId} where tokenId is a hash of the token. Update initFCM and cleanupFCMToken accordingly.
Step 3 - Fix single-token-per-user in functions/index.js: Update getTokensForUser, getAllTokens, getAllTokensExcept, and token cleanup to use the new subcollection model.
Step 4 - Fix chat notification blast in functions/index.js: Remove onChatCreated since chat already sends notifications via hrd_notifikasi (which triggers onNotifikasiCreated).
Step 5 - Fix logout cleanup race in core.js: Save currentUser.id before calling cleanup, or make doLogout async and await cleanupFCMToken().
Step 6 - Add clearer comments for VAPID key and gcm_sender_id configuration.
acceptance_criteria: firebase-messaging-sw.js uses onBackgroundMessage() instead of manual push event listener
Token storage uses subcollection model: hrd_fcm_tokens/{userId}/devices/{tokenId}
Cloud Functions helpers read from subcollection model
onChatCreated function is removed from functions/index.js
doLogout properly awaits or captures userId before cleanupFCMToken
VAPID_KEY and gcm_sender_id have clear explanatory comments
verification: Run: npx prettier --check firebase-messaging-sw.js core.js functions/index.js manifest.json
findings: All review issues resolved. Used messaging.onBackgroundMessage() instead of manual push listener. Token storage moved to subcollection hrd_fcm_tokens/{userId}/devices/{tokenHash}. onChatCreated removed because chat already notifies via hrd_notifikasi. Logout race fixed by passing userId as parameter to cleanupFCMToken.
